title: Meratia yunnanensis

The classification of Meratia yunnanensis is typically placed in the order Lamiales. This plant belongs to the family Gesneriaceae which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the "African violets" or "Gesneriads." The classification of Meratia yunnanensis is further divided into the genus Meratia.
